title: ilex × hodginsii
intro: Ilex × hodginsii, also known as Hodgins' holly, is a hybrid plant that results from the cross between Ilex glabra and Ilex opaca. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, as well as its antiviral and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ilex × hodginsii include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall health. Ilex × hodginsii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
